FFmpeg source/license provenance (Windows x64 bundle)

- Runtime distribution source: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds
- Runtime distribution release API: https://api.github.com/repos/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/latest
- Asset selection pattern: *win64-lgpl-shared*.zip
- Fetch script used by this repository: ENGINE/build/download-ffmpeg-lgpl-win-x64.ps1
- Upstream FFmpeg source repository: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- LGPL text source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/master/COPYING.LGPLv2.1
